name: mailbox-delegation-audit
title: Mailbox Delegation Audit
shortDescription: This script connects to Exchange Online, enumerates mailboxes, and reports FullAccess, SendAs, and SendOnBehalf delegates.
longDescription: Produces a consolidated mailbox delegation report across user and shared mailboxes for governance, compliance, and access reviews.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Mailbox Delegation Audit

references.name: Exchange Online PowerShell module
references.description: Learn how to connect to Exchange Online and use Exchange Online PowerShell cmdlets.
